brand_guardrails: keep it minimal, intelligent, and premium
avoid neon health-tech or biohacking aesthetics
avoid direct medical, anti-aging, or guaranteed function language
match mood, palette, light quality, whitespace, and restraint from the selected references without duplicating exact crop, pose, object placement, or gradient pattern
lock typography across the set: cover headline bold, cover supporting line medium, inner slides medium, CTA slide medium
do not introduce extra headings, subheads, or mixed font weights on inner slides
composition: centered or slightly offset focal balance
white-led educational layout with calm mobile readability
reference_strategy: Use the approved Education White Card working example for the premium feel, softness, luminous restraint, and series consistency, then use the education-layout anchor for typography spacing and card rhythm, the cool-palette anchor for tonality and light restraint, and the CTA-layout anchor only for the final save card hierarchy.
variation_guardrails: do not copy exact paragraph layout from the references
vary crop and focal placement across the carousel system
keep apricot accents restrained and secondary
avoid repeating the same background wash on every slide
keep the carousel more introductory and education-first than campaign-like
feel like the same family as the approved Education White Card without repeating the exact layout
preserve the premium softness and calm visual confidence of the approved Education White Card working example

slides_ja: ミトコンドリアは、細胞のエネルギーづくりを支える存在です。
年齢や生活習慣の影響で、働き方がゆるやかに変わることがあります。
難しく見えるテーマも、まずは基礎から知ることが第一歩です。
毎日のケアでは、整った生活習慣とやさしい継続が大切です。
保存して、毎日の土台を見直すきっかけに。

reference_files: brand/references/business-context/strategy/Mitozz Japan Brand Voice And Messaging Guidelines.docx.pdf
notes: March 23 educational carousel. Introduce mitochondria in a calm, premium, easy-to-save format that feels intelligent rather than technical. Keep the Steel Light system consistent while varying crop, focal placement, and background treatment. Lean directly into the premium softness and feel of the approved Education White Card working example. Typography must stay locked across the full carousel.
